item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: aha, it breached containment when someone decided to kill themselves with it, not when they tried to. clever.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
What happens if everybody that the individual knows is dead? Does it just not do anything? I feel like something explaining that could be added to the article.
(btw, great article, you could really feel sympathy for the doctor who accidentally killed his friends and family)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Narratively, I'd say that's the better way to go, anyway. So 3113 is kind of the scar left behind on this site's reality due to some extranormal fuckhead breaking in and taking shit. Grr, extranormal fuckheads! >:B

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's more of an Easter Egg than anything.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: IMO it's the first, and that would make the most sense, but I could see a convoluted series of events in which this item they want just happens to be guarded by useless walls and locks, and the guards just happen to have useless bullets.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The one thing I want to know is whether the log comes before or after the contents were altered to become 3113. Is it this guy's presence that transmuted them, or did he sneak in knowing he could get stuff with his moving-things powers?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: While written well, I feel like the specific reference can be very confusing to someone unfamiliar with the source (like I am). Neutral vote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yeah, Containment Procedures are at their best when they're like puzzle solving, and sometimes that means trial and error.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I really like this. When you initially showed it to me, that "get out of my way" mood really didn't touch me. But this one really works it over well. I love the bullets counting as being in his way. I love that they don't directly hurt humans but they can rebound and cause humans to get owned. It's a good stand scp.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Nice touch there with the footnote in the containment procedures. I think, oddly enough, that was my favorite part.

item.title: This must be the work of an enemy Stand!
item.content:encoded:
Thanks to everyone who reviewed this!

Stand Master: ???
Stand Name:「In My Way」

Power: B
Range: A
Speed: A
Staying: C
Precision: E
Learning: D
